data.body:
[6/25(Sat) Connection Error in Servers]

There is currently a connection error in all servers with the popup 'Maintenence in progress. Closing the app'.
Please check following notice for the further details. 

We apologize for the inconvenience caused.



The issue is now resolved.
- Compensation: Pyroxenes x240

* The compensation will be distributed after the maintenance on 6/28(Tue).
